query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_compute.builds
            (id, app_id, trigger_type, source_branch,
             commit_sha, commit_message, pr_number, status,
             cloud_build_id, container_image, artifact_path,
             duration_secs,
             error_message, github_check_run_id,
             github_installation_id, iac_plan_output,
             created_at, updated_at)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?,
                    ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
